name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: A hover tooltip for showing contextual information over any widget.

docs.overview: Hover tooltip for showing contextual information over any widget.
docs.usage: Tooltip({ content: 'Helpful text', children: Button({ children: 'Hover me' }) })
docs.accessibility: Tooltip content is announced with role 'label' for screen readers. Native tooltip is set via Perry's widgetSetTooltip as the primary accessibility mechanism.

props.name: content
props.description: Text displayed inside the tooltip bubble

props.name: children
props.description: The widget the tooltip is attached to

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip appears on hover

examples.name: default
examples.title: Basic Tooltip
examples.code: Tooltip({ content: 'Helpful text', children: Button({ children: 'Hover me' }) })

agent.summary: Tooltip shows contextual information on hover over any widget.
doNotUseWhen: Critical information that must always be visible
Long-form content that needs a popover instead
layoutHints: Keep tooltip content concise (one short sentence)
Use delay to avoid flickering on quick mouse passes
accessibilityChecklist: Ensure content is meaningful and concise
Native tooltip is set for screen reader support
Do not rely on tooltip alone for critical instructions
